overall.description: A smooth FPV drone flight through a virtual savanna grassland in a game engine simulation. The drone flies through scattered acacia trees under a clear midday sky, with distant hills visible on the horizon and tall green grass covering the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: savanna grassland approaching acacia tree cluster

events.description: drone flies through acacia tree branches causing temporary occlusion of the view

agents.ego_description: flying drone forward through tall grassland towards a cluster of acacia trees

entered.detail: cluster of flat-topped acacia trees with green canopies
low rolling hills visible on the horizon beneath the blue sky
tall green savanna grass covering the ground plane

segments.scene_description: The drone flies low over a vivid green savanna grassland, approaching a cluster of acacia trees in the distance. The sky is clear blue and the sun is high. At around 7 seconds, the drone passes directly through the tree branches, causing a brief occlusion before emerging into open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open savanna grassland with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: continuing steady drone flight through open grassland, navigating past scattered acacia trees

entered.detail: individual acacia trees scattered across the grassland appearing on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the initial tree cluster, the drone continues its steady flight through the open savanna. Scattered acacia trees dot the landscape on both sides while the distant hills remain visible ahead. The tall grass flows beneath the drone as it maintains a consistent altitude and speed through the serene virtual environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight across a vivid green savanna that transitions from a dense cluster of foliage into a wide, open grassland. It begins with a low-altitude glide over the lush terrain, heading directly toward a group of acacia trees under a clear blue midday sky. As the camera passes through the interlocking branches, a brief occlusion occurs before the view breaks open into a vast expanse of savanna. The scene then expands to reveal scattered trees dotting the landscape on both sides, with the tall grass flowing steadily beneath the drone. Finally, the camera maintains its consistent speed and altitude, gliding toward distant hills visible on the horizon.
